user.title: Home Tasks
user.description: Choose what you want to set up.

native.title: Create Task List
native.description: Enter a name for the new task list.

external.title: Link External Todo List
external.description: Select an external todo entity to enhance with Home Tasks features (priority, tags, sub-tasks, etc.).

error.empty_name: The name must not be empty.
error.name_too_long: The name is too long (max 100 characters).
error.duplicate_name: A list with this name already exists.

abort.no_external_entities: No external todo entities found. Please set up a CalDAV, Google Tasks, or Todoist integration first.
